fields.localRole: CompaniesManager active configuration with credential identifiers masked

tools.note: Local configuration lookup; no App Store Connect REST operation is called. The response intentionally projects masked key and issuer identifiers rather than credentials.

fields.localRole: CompaniesManager configured companies with masked key IDs

tools.note: Local server configuration inventory; it is not the App Store Connect Users API and does not discover provider organizations from Apple.

fields.localRole: exact configured company ID or first case-insensitive partial name match
new active company with masked credential identifiers

tools.note: Local credential-context switch followed by dependent worker reinitialization; no Apple REST operation is called. Partial-name selection returns the first configured match and does not reject ambiguous matches.
